prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Mazda FE-ZE (1.8L DOHC 16V, 130-140ps stock)** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger**, custom **Toda Racing forged pistons (8.5:1 CR)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and a **Tomei 264° camshaft** for 300+ hp on E85 fuel. Supporting mods include a **HKS SSQV blow-off valve**, **GReddy intercooler kit (front-mount, 600x300x80mm core)**, and a **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump** with **ID1000 injectors**.

Full **BC Racing BR coilover suspension** with **Swift springs (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear)**, **Cusco 22mm front sway bar**, and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (18mm)**. Chassis reinforcement via **Cusco front strut tower bar** and **Mazdaspeed rear subframe brace**.

Drivetrain upgrades: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way)**, **Mazdaspeed 6-speed manual transmission swap (from GC8 Impreza, adapted with custom bellhousing)**, **South Bend Stage 3+ clutch**, and **Mazdaspeed short shifter with carbon fiber shift knob**. Braking system features **DBA 5000 Series rotors (320mm front, 280mm rear)**, **Hawk HT-10 pads**, and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (Capella-specific, 30mm front/40mm rear fender flares)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned from a FD RX-7)** and **Veilside Fortune rear diffuser**. Paint: **PPG Mazda Soul Red Crystal with matte black accents** and **3M Gloss Black vinyl roof wrap**.

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (17x9 +22 front, 17x10 +25 rear)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Yokohama Advan A052 tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear)**. Fender rolling via **Eastwood fender roller tool** to prevent tire rub.

**Custom JDM-style aero**: **Mazdaspeed OEM+ rear wing (carbon fiber, 1200mm span)** with **adjustable mounts**, **Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional NACA ducts for intercooler cooling)**, and **Mazdaspeed side skirts (OEM-style, extended for Rocket Bunny flares)**. Lighting: **Morimoto XB LED headlights (HID projector retrofit)** and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights (clear lens, red LED)**.
